_comment: GOLDEN: the canonical output of patron/js/compile.js on news_agent.graph.json. The composer's link-traced lowering MUST reproduce this byte-for-byte (the Phase-1 regression gate, design §4.5). Regenerate with: cd patron && node -e 'console.log(JSON.stringify(require("./js/compile.js").compile(require("./examples/news-agent.graph.json")), null, 2))'

input.template: Curate the {n} best morning headlines about {topic}.
